headline: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Slides Before Earnings As Valuation Debate Comes Back Into Focus
summary: Enphase Energy (ENPH) is back in focus after a sharp 3.5% single session drop and a decline of 21.68% over the past month, as investors look ahead to an earnings report with projected year-over-year pressure on EPS and revenue. See our latest analysis for Enphase Energy. Beyond the latest 3.5% single session drop, Enphase Energy’s share price has fallen 23.33% over the past 30 days but is still up 32.03% over 90 days and 27.38% year to date. The 1 year total shareholder return of 5.01%...
